text:
Tha
Takhayyul jo humsafar mera
Aasmaan
Par hua guzar mera
Udta
Jaata tha aur na tha koi
Jaan-ne
Waala charkh par mera
Taare
Hairat se dekhte the mujhe
Raaz
Sar-basta tha safar mera
Halqa-e
Subh o shaam se nikla
Iss
Puraane nizaam se nikla
Kya
Sunaaun tumhein Iram kya hai
Khaatam-e
Aarzoo-e-deeda o gosh
Shaakh-e
Tooba! pe naghma-raiz tuyoor
Be-
Hijaabana hoor jalwa-farosh
Saaqiyaan-e
Jameel jaam-badast
Peenay
Waalon mein shor-e-nosha-nosh
Door
Jannat se aankh ne dekha
Ek
Taareek khana sard o khamosh
Taali'-e
Qais o gesu-e-Laila
Iss
Ki taareekiyon se dosh-ba-dosh
Khunak
Aisa keh jiss se sharma kar
Kurra-e
Zamhareer ho ro-posh
Main
Ne poochhi jo kaifiyat is ki
Hairat
Angaiz tha jawaab-e-Surosh
Yeh
Maqaam-e-khunak jahannum hai
Naar
Se, noor se teh-e-aaghosh
Sholay
Hote hain musta'aar is ke
Jin
Se larzaan hain mard-e-ibrat-kosh
Ahl-e
Duniya yahan jo aate hain
Apne
Angaar saath laate hain
